title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime.
body:

# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga/light novel That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the favourite characters and of course the mc Rimuru Tempest.

## Recommended Modpack
- [**TenSura (Reincarnated as a Slime)**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/tensura-suraimu)

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
